title: Wynncraft Epoch Silencer | SILENCE THAT EPOCH
description:
If epoch is too loud, this pack is for you :)
 
<!> May have some side effects reguarding the use of the same sound elseware in the game.  <!>
body:
Silence the sound epoch makes. ||<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/cmvPsxaGNcw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
This pack causes the flint and steel ignite sound to become silent in which it will not just effect epoch, but also everywhere else the sound is used.
